title: Workload View on Portfolio does not calculate capacity correctly

posts.author: Dswanker (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: Has Anyone attempted to Validate how the workload view on a portfolio board calculates capacity. I have found that it sometimes calculates correctly for example if a person has a single board. When people have more then 1 board, the calculations for capacity are wildly incorrect. I’m reaching out to the community to see if anyone has spent the time to actually review if the capacity calculation is correct when a person has more then 1 board assigned.
